channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Zanzibar House of Representatives Trains Journalists on Parliamentary Procedures and Reporting
item.description: Journalists covering the Zanzibar House of Representatives gathered at the conference hall in Chukwani on February 14, 2026, for a one-day intensive seminar aimed at strengthening their understanding ...

item.title: Russia Offers to Mediate Pakistan-India, Pakistan-Afghanistan Disputes Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: Russia’s ambassador to Pakistan, Albert Khorev, has extended an offer to mediate in Pakistan’s ongoing conflicts with India and Afghanistan. The tensions between Islamabad and New Delhi have escalated...

item.title: Victorian Poll Shows Labor and Liberal Support Falling, One Nation Rising
item.description: Recent polling in Victoria indicates a sharp decline in support for both the Labor Party and the Liberal-National Coalition ahead of the state's November election. According to the latest survey condu...

item.title: Deputy PM Dar begins Pakistan-EU strategic dialogue in Brussels
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar arrived in Brussels on Wednesday to co-chair the 7th session of the Pakistan-EU Strategic Dialogue, following his visit to Russia for the Shanghai ...

item.title: UK to Deploy HMS Dragon and Anti-Drone Helicopters to Cyprus Following Drone Attack
item.description: Britain has confirmed it will deploy the Type 45 air defence destroyer HMS Dragon and helicopters equipped with counter-drone capabilities to Cyprus, in response to a recent drone strike on RAF Akroti...

item.title: Siaya doctors withdraw services demanding action over alleged assault at Bondo hospital
item.description: Health services in Siaya County were disrupted after doctors downed their tools to protest an alleged assault on a colleague at Bondo Sub-County Hospital. The Kenya Medical Practitioners, Pharmacists ...

item.title: Hellen Dausen shares lessons on building sustainable African businesses
item.description: Hellen Dausen, former Miss Universe Tanzania 2010, has shifted her focus from pageantry to entrepreneurship, founding Nuya’s Essence, a natural skincare brand rooted in African ingredients. She stress...

item.title: Karur Rally Tragedy: Vijay's Political Future at Stake
item.description: The tragic stampede at a rally in Karur on September 27 claimed 41 lives, severely impacting Tamil superstar Vijay's emerging political career. The rally, meant to showcase his political strength, tur...

item.title: Ongoing US and Israeli strikes in Iran escalate regional tensions as Khamenei’s succession looms
item.description: The conflict between the US, Israel, and Iran continues to intensify, with the recent airstrikes causing significant casualties and regional instability. Over 200 Australians are returning from Dubai ...

item.title: A14 westbound near Ipswich remains closed after serious lorry crash
item.description: The A14 westbound near Ipswich was closed for over twelve hours following a serious lorry collision that occurred around 8pm on Tuesday evening. The stretch affected lies between Sproughton and Whiteh...

item.title: Parliamentary Leaders Briefed on Regional Security, Afghanistan and Middle East Situation at PM House
item.description: An in-camera briefing on the prevailing regional security environment was held at the Prime Minister’s House under the chairmanship of Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif. The session, which lasted over two...

item.title: My Uncle and Other Victims Held Hostage in Northern Nigeria, Plea for Rescue
item.description: Three weeks don pass since my uncle waka go from im house early morning and no come back. Dem kidnappers carry am go forest wey dey spread across Taraba, Plateau, and Bauchi, and dem still dey hold am...

item.title: Philippine Navy observes over 60 Chinese ships in West Philippine Sea in February
item.description: The Philippine Navy reported monitoring a total of 62 Chinese vessels in the West Philippine Sea throughout February. These ships belonged to the People’s Liberation Army Navy (PLA-N) and the China Co...

item.title: Ruto Announces Completion of Transfer of Key Functions to Counties
item.description: President William Ruto has confirmed that the national government has completed the transfer of all devolved functions to the counties. Speaking at the 12th National and County Governments Summit at S...

item.title: Five Years Using a Brain-Computer Interface: Rodney Gorham’s Experience with ALS
item.description: Rodney Gorham, a 65-year-old man with amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), has lived with a Synchron brain-computer interface for five years, making him the longest user of this experimental technolog...

item.title: Lessons from the 1953 CIA Regime Change in Iran and Trump's Lack of a Clear Strategy
item.description: The article compares the U.S. bombing of Iran in 2026 with the CIA's covert operation in 1953 that successfully ousted Iran's Prime Minister Mohammad Mossadegh. The Trump administration's 2026 militar...

item.title: Philippine Authorities Confirm Termination of Chinese-Linked Espionage Network
item.description: The Philippines’ National Security Council (NSC) announced on March 4, 2026, that espionage operations connected to China have been identified, addressed, and terminated. These operations involved Chi...

item.title: Comelec Suspends Overseas Voter Registration in Israel Until March 7, Iran Until Further Notice Amid Middle East Conflict
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – The Commission on Elections (Comelec) announced the temporary suspension of overseas voter registration in Israel and Iran due to escalating tensions and ongoing conflict in the ...

item.title: Current Tensions Between the US and UK Amid Iran and Epstein Controversies
item.description: The Sky News podcast highlights growing tensions between the United States and the United Kingdom, particularly focusing on the political dynamic between former President Donald Trump and Prime Minist...

item.title: DNC Cancels Midterm Convention Due to Fundraising Challenges
item.description: The Democratic National Committee (DNC) has announced that it will not be hosting a midterm convention, citing significant fundraising difficulties as the main reason. The decision was made after feed...
